backstory.original: Warduke's services as a remorseless killer-for-hire can be easily bought. The evil swordsman isn't terribly bright, which is why he leaves the plotting and scheming to others. He just likes to hit things with his sword.
backstory.display: 作为一名无情的雇佣杀手，你很容易就能购买到战争公爵的服务。这位邪恶的剑客并不十分聪明，所以他把阴谋诡计都交给别人。他只喜欢用剑攻击目标。

description.original: Warduke moves up to the closest enemy and swings his sword, dealing one hit to all nearby enemies with a melee attack.
description.display: 战争公爵移动到距离最近的敌人身边并挥舞长剑，对附近所有敌人发动一次近战攻击。

description.original: Warduke's sword ignites in flames for 30 seconds. Warduke deals additional damage and takes half damage.
description.display: 战争公爵的剑燃烧 30 秒。战争公爵造成额外伤害，并且受到的伤害减半。

longDescription.original: Warduke's sword Nightwind ignites in flames for 30 seconds. For the duration, Warduke deals an additional 1000% damage with his normal attacks and he takes half damage from all sources. If Warduke activates his ultimate again before its effect expires the duration is refreshed.
longDescription.display: 战争公爵的剑“晚风”燃烧 30 秒。在此期间，战争公爵的普通攻击额外造成 1000% 的伤害，并从所有来源受到的伤害减半。如果战争公爵在效果消失之前再次激活杀招，则持续时间刷新。

description.original: Each time Warduke attacks or takes damage, he does more damage on his next attack.
description.display: 每当战争公爵攻击或受到伤害时，他的下一次攻击造成更多伤害。

description.original: Warduke inverts the targets of many positional formation abilities.
description.display: 战争公爵会反转许多位置阵型技能的目标。

description.desc: Each time $(source_hero) attacks or is damaged, he gains a Remorseless stack. $(source_hero) increases his damage by $(amount)% for each Remorseless stack he has, stacking additively. Stacks are reset when traveling to a new area.
$(source_hero)每次攻击或受到伤害时，均可获得一层“无情”堆叠。每层“无情”均使$(source_hero)的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。移动到新区域时，堆叠重置。

tipText.original: Every time warduke attacks or is damaged, he deals more damage on his next attack. This bonus resets when changing areas.
tipText.display: 每当战争公爵攻击或受到伤害时，他的下一次攻击造成更多伤害。改变区域时重置此加成。

description.desc: Increase the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of $(source_hero)'s max health.
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$(source_hero)最大生命值的 $(amount)%。
Most positional formation abilities' targets are inverted.
大多数位置阵型技能的目标被反转。

tipText.original: Warduke inverts the targets of many positional formation abilities, opening up completely new formations.
tipText.display: 战争公爵会反转许多位置阵型技能的目标，开启全新的阵型。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by $(amount)% for each positional formation ability affecting him, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack multiplier.
每个影响$(source_hero)位置的阵型技能，均使其伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。增益作用于堆叠前的数值。
$(source_hero)'s damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Chaotic Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位混乱阵营勇士均使$(source_hero)的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Warduke focuses on Chaos, increasing his damage.
specializationDescription.display: 战争公爵专注于混乱，提高他的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Gold Find Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位金币寻获型勇士均使$(source_hero)的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Warduke focuses on gold, increasing his damage.
specializationDescription.display: 战争公爵专注于黄金，提高他的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位邪恶阵营勇士均使$(source_hero)的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Warduke focuses on evil, increasing his damage.
specializationDescription.display: 战争公爵专注于邪恶，提高他的伤害。

name.display: 强化阵型技能 4（作用于堆叠前的数值）

description.original: Test
description.display: 测试

name.display: 测试 - 反转包含祝福

description.original: A Test feat to apply inversion effects from positional formation blessings.
description.display: 应用位置阵型祝福的反转效果的测试专长。

description.original: Do you wish to test your mettle against Warduke?
description.display: 你想在战争公爵面前考验自己的勇气吗？

description.original: I don't need my sword to crush you.
description.display: 我不需要剑就能粉碎你。

description.original: I'd rather die than surrender.
description.display: 若投降，毋宁死。

description.original: It's only a scratch.
description.display: 小擦伤罢了。

description.original: You'll have to get through me.
description.display: 你们必须先击败我。

description.original: My sword takes care of everything. What's there to worry about?
description.display: 我的剑能解决一切。还有什么好担心的？

description.original: I let the blade do the talking.
description.display: 剑会代替我说话。

description.original: I expect to be paid well.
description.display: 我的期望薪金很高。

description.original: With muscles like these, how can I not show them off?
description.display: 我拥有这样的肌肉，怎么能不炫耀呢？

effects.desc: Increase the damage bonus from all Warduke's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: My skills could be put to heroic use? You don't say...
description.display: 我的技能可以用在英雄事业上？真的吗......

description.original: Only a fool would face me in combat.
description.display: 只有傻瓜才会在战斗中面对我。

description.original: They had it coming.
description.display: 他们罪有应得。

description.original: Yes! Burn! Burn and die!
description.display: 就是这样！烧吧！在烈焰中毁灭吧！

description.original: I go where I'm told, and whatever I find there I destroy.
description.display: 我听从命令行事，无论在何处发现目标，都会将其摧毁。

description.original: I don't WANT to think about tactics. I want to HIT things with my SWORD!
description.display: 我不想思考战术。我只想用我的剑去砍东西！

name.display: 维克那的选择战争公爵
